title: Turtle Soup

propositions.label: The man had a past experience of consuming something that someone else falsely presented as turtle soup
The ingredient of the past soup was human flesh
At the time of the past soup experience, the man was in a life-threatening extreme situation
Someone died in connection with the man's past soup experience
The person who served the fake soup was someone close to the man (family or companion)
The past soup was made from a human corpse under extreme food-shortage conditions
The man had once been fed soup made from the flesh of a dead companion, falsely presented as turtle soup, under extreme conditions when food had run out
The taste of the turtle soup the man remembered was different from the restaurant's soup
What the man had previously drunk as 'turtle soup' was not real turtle soup
The man, prompted by confirming the soup, realized a truth about a past experience
The truth the man realized concerned an irreversible event
The taste memory from the past 'turtle soup' experience was vivid enough to distinguish in a single sip
The past soup experience did not occur during an ordinary meal
The true identity of the fake soup was related to the person who died
The person who served the fake soup had some kind of relationship with the man
Food depletion under extreme circumstances was the reason human flesh was used
The man did not check the soup's authenticity because it tasted bad
The man checked the soup's authenticity because it tasted bad
The man's suicide was not caused by financial problems
The man's suicide was caused by financial problems
The man was not a culinary expert
The man was a culinary expert

The past soup being fake was due to the man's own misidentification
The truth the man realized was not about social or financial matters
The truth the man realized was about social or financial matters
The man had not repeatedly drunk something called turtle soup in the past
The man had repeatedly drunk turtle soup many times in the past
The past experience was not related to an emotional event
The past experience was related to an emotional event (breakup, anniversary, etc.)
The ingredient of the past soup was not livestock or wild animal meat
The ingredient of the past soup was livestock or wild animal meat

The person whose flesh was used in the soup was a stranger to the man
The person who served the fake soup did not deceive the man with malicious intent
The person who served the fake soup deceived the man with malicious intent

statement: A man entered a restaurant and ordered turtle soup. After taking one sip, he asked the waiter, 'Is this really turtle soup?' The waiter replied, 'Yes, it is absolutely turtle soup.' That night, the man killed himself. Why?
truth: The man was a sailor who had once been shipwrecked with his companions, and they ran out of food. One of his companions died, and the surviving companions fed the man soup, telling him it was turtle soup. In reality, it was soup made from the dead companion's flesh. When the man drank real turtle soup at the restaurant, he noticed the taste was different, realized the true nature of what he had been fed back then, and killed himself in despair.
